title: cynanchum atrovirens
intro: Cynanchum atrovirens, also known as the Chinese milkvine or black milkwort, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve insulin sensitivity, making it a potential treatment for diabetes. The health benefits of Cynanchum atrovirens include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. Cynanchum atrovirens can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
